arts.ttl: Lecce President Addresses Dorgu-Manchester United Speculation
arts.sum: Just moments before Lecce's crucial league match against Inter, club president Saverio Sticchi Damiani spoke to DAZN, addressing the ongoing transfer saga surrounding Patrick Dorgu and Manchester United. The post Lecce President Addresses Dorgu-Manchester United Speculation appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim points the finger at his Man United players AGAIN ahead of Fulham clash as Rio Ferdinand insists the squad will be 'embarrassed'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has once again blamed his players for Man United's form despite previously saying he regretted labelling his side as 'maybe the worst' in the club's history.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Fulham host struggling Man United
Man Utd's record-breaking stadium plans backed by UK government
arts.sum: Man Utd's plans to invest in the area around Old Trafford receive support from the UK government.

arts.ttl: 'He will be important' - Ruben Amorim confirms position change for Manchester United star
arts.sum: Man Utd play Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday evening and Ruben Amorim explained his team selection before kick-off.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand reveals real reason Marcus Rashford wants to quit Man Utd
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has found himself out of favour under Ruben Amorim at Manchester United and he has not featured for the first team since mid-December, with the player hoping for an exit before the transfer deadline

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Fulham revealed as Ruben Amorim names starting XI
arts.sum: Man United's squad has arrived at Craven Cottage to face Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: How Man Utd would line up with Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has established himself as a key player under Amorim, while Lisandro Martinez has been favoured at left centre-back. Below, FootballTransfers runs through how Dorgu could fit in at Old Trafford if Man Utd are able to reach an agreement to sign the Lecce star.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops Man Utd transfer hint with Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho calls
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is running out of time to add to his Manchester United squad before the transfer window shuts, and his starting line-up against Fulham may have contained clues
